assertions.assertion: Output loads the DPoP JWK from configuration or secure storage rather than generating a new RSA key at startup
assertions.rationale: SKILL.md dpop.md Pitfall section shows loading from configuration['DPoP:JsonWebKey'] from Key Vault/secrets

assertions.assertion: Output sets the DPoPJsonWebKey property on the client credentials client configuration
assertions.rationale: SKILL.md dpop.md shows 'client.DPoPJsonWebKey = jwkJson;' on the client configuration

assertions.assertion: Output warns against or avoids generating ephemeral keys with RSA.Create() on every process restart
assertions.rationale: SKILL.md dpop.md Pitfall explicitly warns 'New key generated on every restart — all previously issued DPoP-bound tokens become unusable'

assertions.assertion: Output registers the client via AddClientCredentialsTokenManagement().AddClient() with the DPoP key configured
assertions.rationale: SKILL.md dpop.md shows services.AddClientCredentialsTokenManagement().AddClient('my.client', client => { client.DPoPJsonWebKey = jwkJson; })
